caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as there are mannequins dressed in clothing and racks of garments in the background. The walls are adorned with framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hand while speaking into the microphone. The overall atmosphere suggests an informal yet professional discussion, possibly related to business or lifestyle topics.
